SourceProxy.name: ImageBasedClustering
SourceProxy.label: Image Based Clustering

Documentation.short_help: Compute clusters based on the projection difference of 2 point clouds
Documentation.long_help: Compute clusters based on the projection difference of 2 point clouds

SourceProxy.Documentation: Compute clusters based on the projection difference of 2 point clouds

StringVectorProperty.name: SelectValueArray
StringVectorProperty.label: Value
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: The scalar to use for image difference

IntVectorProperty.name: Resolution
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: The image resolution. A higher resolution will give you more details, but depending on your points density, the resulting image could have empty areas.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Focal Length
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: The focal length. It is multiplicated by resolution width and represent the focal distance.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Camera Direction
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: A vector representing the camera direction (will be normalized).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Camera Angle
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: The roll of the camera (around direction axis).

StringVectorProperty.name: Result Scalar
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: The name of the created scalar that identify clusters.

IntVectorProperty.name: Min Number Of Pixels
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: The minimum number of pixels to have in one cluster.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Max Distance To Erosion Cluster
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: The distance threshold to include points that disapeared during erosion process.

IntVectorProperty.name: Fill With Neighbors
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If activated, replace NaN pixel values by one of its 4 neighbors if one is different from NaN.
